center.name: 古勒姆特区
center.summary: 古勒姆特区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白鹳，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |publisher= BirdLife South Africa |isbn= 978-0-620-20729-4 |chapter-url= http://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/083.pdf |via= South African Bird Atlas Project 2}} A small population of white storks winters in India and is thought to derive principally from the C. c. asiatica population as flocks of up to 200 birds have been observed on spring migration in the early 1900s through the Kurram Valley.{{cite journal |last1= Whitehead |first1= Charles Hughes Tempest |year= 1911 |title= On the birds of Kohat and the Kurram Valley

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |publisher= BirdLife South Africa |isbn= 978-0-620-20729-4 |chapter-url= http://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/083.pdf |via= South African Bird Atlas Project 2}} A small population of white storks winters in India and is thought to derive principally from the C. c. asiatica population as flocks of up to 200 birds have been observed on spring migration in the early 1900s through the Kurram Valley.{{cite journal |last1= Whitehead |first1= Charles Hughes Tempest |year= 1911 |title= On the birds of Kohat and the Kurram Valley
